abstract: Comprehensive paid ad creative specifications for Google Display Network (standard IAB sizes + Performance Max), Meta (feed, stories, carousel, collection), LinkedIn (single image, carousel, video, message), TikTok (in-feed, branded effects, TopView), and YouTube (skippable, non-skippable, bumper, discovery). Includes visual hierarchy patterns (F-pattern, Z-pattern, focal point), text overlay limits, character limits per platform, CTA design guidelines, asset checklists, and storyboarding examples for multi-frame campaigns.
